question: Title
FORMULA_RECOGNITION_DESC: Upload handwritten formula images, support extracting and converting formulas from the images into LateX code
INTELLIGENT_CORRECTION_DESC: Automatically grade subjective questions in assignments and exams
VIDEO_ANALYSIS_DESC: automatically generate clip summaries, captions, and a word cloud for the uploaded video
DOCUMENT_READING_DESC: support uploading documents, conducting Q&A, question setting, and generating word clouds based on document content.
PPT_GENERATE_DESC: to solve the problem of PPT generation in various scenarios, quickly and automatically generate according to the theme, and improve the efficiency of PPT production.
KNOWLEDGE_GRAPH_DESC: Intelligently generate a knowledge graph based on the knowledge base
